# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages: 
 - test   # Stage used only during testing (e.g., pytest)    pipelines/master..refs/heads dev-tools --select=pipeline%3Abranch_name .gitlab CI / CD Pipelin... master %40 ... kwu6h8z
 - build  # Stage used to prepare the project for a release, e.g., pytest    pipelines/.master..refs/heads dev-tools --select=pipeline%3Abranch_name .gitlab CI / CD Pipelin... master %40 ... kwu6h8z
 - deploy # Stage used to apply the project, e.g., git push    pipelines/.master..refs/heads dev-tools --select=pipeline%3Abranch_name .gitlab CI / CD Pipelin... master %40 ... kwu6h8z
